question:
[Location] = 180 Park Road
What are the last names of friends of people connected to the incident at 180 Park Road?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:Person)-[:KNOWS_SN]-(x1:Person)-[:PARTY_TO]-(x2:Crime)-[:OCCURRED_AT]-(x3:Location WHERE x3.address = "180 Park Road")
RETURN x0.surname

question:
[Person] = Cooper
[Location] = BL5 2RN
Can you identify people who share a flat and are acquainted with a Cooper at the address with postcode BL5 2RN?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:Person)-[:KNOWS_LW]-(x1:Person)
MATCH (x0:Person)-[:KNOWS]-(x2:Person WHERE x2.surname = "Cooper")-[:CURRENT_ADDRESS]-(x3:Location WHERE x3.postcode = "BL5 2RN")
RETURN x0

[Person] = Hansen
What is the date of the last call received by a resident living with a Hansen?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:PhoneCall)-[:CALLED]-(x1:Phone)-[:HAS_PHONE]-(x2:Person)-[:KNOWS_LW]-(x3:Person WHERE x3.surname = "Hansen")

RETURN x0.date

LIMIT 1

question:
[Person] = 881-20-2396
[Officer] = 24-4821051
Could you list the NHS numbers of people connected to crimes probed by officer 24-4821051 who have a connection to someone with NHS number 881-20-2396?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:Person)-[:KNOWS]-(x1:Person WHERE x1.nhs_no = "881-20-2396")
MATCH (x0:Person)-[:PARTY_TO]-(x2:Crime)-[:INVESTIGATED_BY]-(x3:Officer WHERE x3.badge_no = "24-4821051")
RETURN x0.nhs_no

How many officers were involved in the investigation of the crime that involved a person at 46 High Meadows?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:Officer)-[:INVESTIGATED_BY]-(x1:Crime)-[:PARTY_TO]-(x2:Person)

RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT x0)

question:

RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT x0)

question:
[Person] = Flores
[Person] = Brown
What are the emails of individuals with surname Brown who are known by people with last name Flores?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:Email)-[:HAS_EMAIL]-(x2:Person)-[:KNOWS]-(x3:Person WHERE x3.surname = "Flores")
MATCH (x0:Email)-[:HAS_EMAIL]-(x1:Person WHERE x1.surname = "Brown")
RETURN x0

question:
[Person] = 873-28-7561
When was the latest call received by a contact of the individual with NHS number 873-28-7561?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:PhoneCall)-[:CALLED]-(x1:Phone)-[:HAS_PHONE]-(x2:Person)-[:KNOWS_PHONE]-(x3:Person WHERE x3.nhs_no = "873-28-7561")
RETURN x0.call_date
ORDER BY x0.call_date DESC
LIMIT 1

question:
[Person] = 609-34-3409
What is the number of people living with a friend of someone who has the phone number of the person with NHS ID 609-34-3409?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:Person)-[:KNOWS_LW]-(x1:Person)-[:KNOWS_SN]-(x2:Person)-[:KNOWS_PHONE]-(x3:Person WHERE x3.nhs_no = "609-34-3409")
RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT x0)

question:
[Crime] = Vehicle crime
[Officer] = Police Constable
[Crime] = 22/08/2017
Which vehicle, with the most years, was linked to vehicle crimes investigated by Police Constables on 22/08/2017?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:Vehicle)-[:INVOLVED_IN]-(x1:Crime WHERE x1.type = "Vehicle crime")-[:INVESTIGATED_BY]-(x2:Officer WHERE x2.rank = "Police Constable")-[:INVESTIGATED_BY]-(x3:Crime WHERE x3.date = "22/08/2017")
RETURN x0
ORDER BY x0.year DESC
LIMIT 1

[Crime] = 22/08/2017
[Person] = Phillips
Which violence and sexual offences took place on August 22, 2017, at residences of individuals with the surname Phillips?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:Crime WHERE x0.type = "Violence and sexual offences")-[:OCCURRED_AT]-(x1:Location)-[:OCCURRED_AT]-(x3:Crime WHERE x3.date = "22/08/2017")

RETURN x0

reference_cypher:

What is the number of crimes linked to the individual also connected to a vehicle crime probed by officer 25-4967138?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:Crime)-[:PARTY_TO]-(x1:Person)-[:PARTY_TO]-(x2:Crime WHERE x2.type = "Vehicle crime")-[:INVESTIGATED_BY]-(x3:Officer WHERE x3.badge_no = "25-4967138")
RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT x0)

MATCH (x0:Crime)-[:PARTY_TO]-(x1:Person)-[:KNOWS_PHONE]-(x2:Person)-[:KNOWS_SN]-(x3:Person WHERE x3.surname = "James")
RETURN x0
ORDER BY x0.date ASC
LIMIT 1

MATCH (x0:PhoneCall)-[:CALLER]-(x1:Phone)-[:HAS_PHONE]-(x2:Person)-[:PARTY_TO]-(x3:Crime WHERE x3.last_outcome = "Investigation complete; no suspect identified")
RETURN x0
ORDER BY x0.call_duration DESC
LIMIT 1

What is longest call for a phone with a 26-second outgoing call and an incoming call at 13:45?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:PhoneCall)-[:CALLED]-(x1:Phone)-[:CALLER]-(x2:PhoneCall WHERE x2.call_duration = "26")
MATCH (x1:Phone)-[:CALLER]-(x3:PhoneCall WHERE x3.call_time = "13:45")
RETURN x0
ORDER BY x0.call_duration DESC
LIMIT 1

What are the phones of individuals linked to cases handled by officer 52-7160405?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:Phone)-[:HAS_PHONE]-(x1:Person)-[:PARTY_TO]-(x2:Crime)-[:INVESTIGATED_BY]-(x3:Officer WHERE x3.badge_no = "52-7160405")
RETURN x0

question:
[Crime] = Violence and sexual offences
[Crime] = 22/08/2017
[Person] = Phillips
Can you identify all violent and sexual offences from 22/08/2017 that happened at the homes of those with the last name Phillips?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:Crime WHERE x0.type = "Violence and sexual offences")-[:OCCURRED_AT]-(x1:Location)-[:OCCURRED_AT]-(x3:Crime WHERE x3.date = "22/08/2017")
MATCH (x1:Location)-[:CURRENT_ADDRESS]-(x2:Person WHERE x2.surname = "Phillips")
RETURN x0

question:
[Officer] = Stanman
[Crime] = Under investigation
[Person] = George
How many cases are being looked into by officers with the surname Stanman who also investigate ongoing investigation of cases involving someone with surname George?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:Crime)-[:INVESTIGATED_BY]-(x1:Officer WHERE x1.surname = "Stanman")-[:INVESTIGATED_BY]-(x2:Crime WHERE x2.last_outcome = "Under investigation")-[:PARTY_TO]-(x3:Person WHERE x3.surname = "George")
RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT x0)

question:
[Crime] = Investigation complete; no suspect identified
[Location] = Petrol Station

reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:Crime)-[:PARTY_TO]-(x1:Person)-[:PARTY_TO]-(x2:Crime WHERE x2.last_outcome = "Investigation complete; no suspect identified")-[:OCCURRED_AT]-(x3:Location WHERE x3.address = "Petrol Station")
RETURN x0
ORDER BY x0.date DESC
LIMIT 1

question:
[Crime] = 17/08/2017
[Officer] = Inspector
[Crime] = Investigation complete; no suspect identified
[Vehicle] = Avenger
How many crimes on 17/08/2017 involving people were investigated by Inspectors who also handled cases marked as "Investigation complete; no suspect identified" and involved Avenger vehicles?
reference_cypher:
MATCH (x0:Crime WHERE x0.date = "17/08/2017")-[:PARTY_TO]-(x1:Person)
MATCH (x0:Crime WHERE x0.date = "17/08/2017")-[:INVESTIGATED_BY]-(x2:Officer WHERE x2.rank = "Inspector")-[:INVESTIGATED_BY]-(x3:Crime WHERE x3.last_outcome = "Investigation complete; no suspect identified")-[:INVOLVED_IN]-(x4:Vehicle WHERE x4.model = "Avenger")
RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT x0)

RETURN x0.year

LIMIT 1
